accessKeyIdDesc: Used to sign Aliyun OSS upload requests.
accessKeySecretDesc: Stored only in local plugin settings. A limited RAM user is recommended.
autoUploadOnPaste: Auto upload and replace pasted images
autoUploadOnSwitch: Auto upload when opening or switching docs
autoUploadOnSwitchDesc: Detect local images in the current document, replace links after successful uploads, and keep local links on failure.
configLooksReady: Required fields are filled. You can try uploading.
controlPanelHint: Saved settings apply immediately. Uploading current document images saves this form first.
customDomainDesc: Optional. Replacement links use this domain when set, for example https://img.example.com.
noEnabledConfig: No image bed config is enabled. Please enable a config in Storage Configs before uploading.
endpointDesc: For example oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com, or just oss-cn-hangzhou.
imageNoLongerExists: The image is no longer in the current document
keepOneConfig: Keep at least one storage config.
managerDesc: Open image bed manager to manage current document images and storage configs.
missingSettings: Please complete image bed settings first
multiProviderHint: Aliyun OSS and Tencent COS are supported. Qiniu and S3-compatible storage are reserved for future support.
noImagesFound: No static images found in the current document
noLocalImagesFound: No local images need uploading in the current document
ossInvalidDate: OSS did not receive a valid date. The plugin now uses x-oss-date; add x-oss-date to the bucket CORS allowed headers and try again.
ossEndpointMismatch: Bucket ${bucket} is in a different region. Change Endpoint to ${endpoint} and try again.
previewInitFailed: Failed to initialize the image preview panel
providerComingSoon: This provider is not implemented yet. Use Aliyun OSS for now.
uploadAllLocalImages: Upload and Replace All Local Images
uploadSummary: Upload complete: ${success} succeeded, ${failed} failed. Failed images kept their local links.
